<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"> <diagram name="Sitemap" id="remotekind-sitemap"> <mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="600" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="820" pageHeight="580" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="navnote" value="Global nav on every page: Home · How It Works · About · Contact" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#6b7280;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="30" y="20" width="420" height="20" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="visitor" value="Visitor lands" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eef2f7;strokeColor=#6b7280;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="340" y="50" width="140" height="40" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="home" value="Home
hero · how-it-works preview · testimonials · CTA" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="305" y="130" width="210" height="74" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="how" value="How It Works
vetting + quality guarantee" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="60" y="280" width="180" height="64" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="about" value="About
founder · why the bar is high" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="280" width="180" height="64" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="contact" value="Contact
booking · email · form" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="580" y="280" width="180" height="64" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="book" value="Book a call ★ PRIMARY CTA" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#1e40af;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="300" y="410" width="220" height="58" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="list" value="Join the list · secondary CTA (lead magnet)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;fillColor=#f0fdf4;strokeColor=#16a34a;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="300" y="500" width="220" height="46" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#6b7280;" edge="1" parent="1" source="visitor" target="home"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;" edge="1" parent="1" source="home" target="how"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;" edge="1" parent="1" source="home" target="about"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2563eb;" edge="1" parent="1" source="home" target="contact"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#16a34a;" edge="1" parent="1" source="how" target="book"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#16a34a;" edge="1" parent="1" source="about" target="book"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#16a34a;" edge="1" parent="1" source="contact" target="list"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> </root>
